TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Del_Beshore, title = Del_Beshore, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Del_Beshore} }

S.FORM: Del Beshore sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1956, byacing te 11 ru 29 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Pennsylvania, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 180 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 75 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Del Beshore sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1956, byacing te 11 ru 29 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Pennsylvania, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 180 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 75 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *el βes~ɕħore s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa penns~ɕjl*ania, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
